judgment.summary: High-growth cybersecurity firm with strong margins but elevated valuation and leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 9.9%; next earnings date is 2026-06-02.
positives: Quarterly earnings growth 61.8% YoY — demonstrating strong profit expansion.
Free cash flow $2.86B TTM — robust cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with 49 analysts covering the stock.
negatives: Forward P/E 62.72x — valuation remains very high, pricing in significant future growth.
Debt/Equity 4.89 — leverage is substantial, though offset by strong cash flow.
Analyst growth est, current Q -0.4% — near-term growth expectations are slightly negative.
Mean target $223.63 is below current spot price $249.60 — suggesting analyst caution.

news.paragraph: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) is seeing a significant price target increase from Truist ahead of its Q1 earnings report. This analyst upgrade suggests positive sentiment from the sell-side as the company approaches its next earnings release. Traders should monitor commentary around cybersecurity demand and competitive positioning during the upcoming earnings call.

headlines.title: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Gets Major Price Target Boost from Truist Ahead of Q1 Results
